news.t: Tema ETFs Exceeds $5bn in AUM After Three Years
Tema ETFs Surpasses $2 Billion in AUM in Under Three Years
Tema Electrification ETF (VOLT) Surpasses $500 Million in AUM
Tema Appoints ETF Industry Leader Steve Munroe as President
Tema Surpasses $1bn AUM Two Years After Launch, Strengthens Team With Key Growth Hires
Tema Launches World's First Electrification ETF ($VOLT)

holdings.infoBox: VOLT is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Powell Industries stock at 7.98%, Bel Fuse at 7.86%, Quanta Services at 5.51%, Eaton Corporation at 5.22%, and NextEra Energy at 4.68%.

overview.description: The Tema Electrification ETF (VOLT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund actively invests in a concentrated portfolio of companies worldwide that are positioned to benefit from the electrification megacycle. The fund seeks long-term growth of capital. VOLT was launched on Dec 3, 2024 and is issued by Tema.
